sobre_h2: Hi! My name is Guilherme Zanfolim
sobre_texto: I'm a student of Systems Analysis and Development, driven by curiosity and the challenge of turning ideas into functional digital solutions. I started my programming journey in technical high school, developing complete projects, including an e-commerce as a final assignment. I have a great ability to learn, I'm dedicated and proactive, always seeking to grow and add value to the projects and teams I'm part of.
html_desc: Language responsible for structuring web page content. Defines elements like headings, paragraphs, images and links.
css_desc: Used to style and organize page layouts. Controls colors, fonts, spacing and responsiveness.
js_desc: Adds interactivity and dynamism to websites. Allows creating animations, validations and real-time actions.
php_desc: Programming language focused on the back-end. Allows creating dynamic systems and database integration.
react_desc: JavaScript library for building modern and dynamic interfaces. Uses reusable components to facilitate code organization.
vscode_desc: Lightweight and powerful code editor used to program in various languages, with extension support and Git integration.
github_desc: Platform to store, version and share code using Git, widely used by developers.
figma_desc: Online UI/UX design tool that allows creating layouts and prototypes collaboratively.
illustrator_desc: Program focused on creating vector art such as logos, icons and illustrations.
photoshop_desc: Image editing and manipulation software, widely used for design, photo retouching and digital creation.
organo_desc: Project developed in the Alura course using React, JavaScript and CSS, focused on creating responsive cards for web interfaces. The project involved developing components applying front-end best practices.
techboard_desc: Project developed during the Alura HTML and CSS training, consisting of a simple landing page applying fundamental concepts of web structuring and styling, such as HTML semantics, CSS selectors, responsiveness and front-end best practices.
contato_desc:
If you enjoyed my projects and want to get in touch,
fill in below with your name and your message.
As soon as I receive it, I will get back to you.
